description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor connectivity. The property includes a driveway with a garage, a covered patio area, a swimming pool, and landscaped green spaces both in the front and rear. The backyard is equipped with outdoor seating, a shaded pergola, and a small detached structure, possibly a guest house or pool house. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The overall design emphasizes functionality, comfort, and a strong connection to outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, open-plan interiors, a garage, pool, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design is minimalistic and emphasizes indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, backyard pool, and detached structure at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, outdoor seating, and access to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, rear patio, and the overall length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
